name: chart/scatter-chart
description: Scatter plot with variable point radius, multi-series, and hover tooltip.

meta.name: ScatterChart
meta.description: Scatter plot with variable point radius, multi-series, and hover tooltip.

props.name: xTicks
props.description: Approximate number of ticks on the x-axis.

props.name: yTicks
props.description: Approximate number of ticks on the y-axis.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS class names merged onto the root element.

props.name: plain
props.description: Marks only — no axes, grid lines, or legend. For micro/inline charts.

props.name: annotations
props.description: Reference lines, shaded bands, and markers drawn over the plot (e.g. a target/threshold line).

props.name: onSelect
props.description: Fired when a point is clicked or activated (Enter/Space) — for drill-down.

props.name: glyph
props.description: Point glyph shape (circle/square/diamond/triangle/cross/star) — a fixed shape or a function to encode a category by shape.

props.name: renderer
props.description: Renderer — svg (default), canvas (force), or auto (canvas past ~2000 points). Canvas keeps the full a11y fallback table + keyboard layer.

props.name: visualMap
props.description: Map each point’s y → CVD-safe colour and/or size via a keyboard-operable legend that filters the visible range.

props.name: toolbox
props.description: Render a keyboard-reachable toolbox — PNG/SVG export, a data-view table toggle, and restore (reset the visualMap filter).

examples.title: Basic scatter chart
examples.code:
import { ScatterChart } from '@cascivo/charts'

const series = [{ id: 'a', label: 'Group A', data: [{x:1,y:2},{x:3,y:4}] }]
<ScatterChart series={series} title="Scatter" />

whenToUse: Revealing correlation or clustering between two numeric variables
Plotting many individual observations across a 2D space
whenNotToUse: Encoding a third magnitude dimension — use BubbleChart
Showing a trend over ordered time — use LineChart

related.name: BubbleChart
related.reason: Use when a third size dimension must be encoded

related.name: LineChart
related.reason: Use when points form an ordered trend over time

intent.a11yRationale: Renders with role="img" and requires a title prop for screen reader labeling.
